title: OUTREACH TO SENIORS AND PEOPLE WITH DISABILITIES - 211info
text: ACCESS OUTREACH TO SENIORS AND PEOPLE WITH DISABILITIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides outreach to offer specialized support to vulnerable community members, helping them live independently in safe and healthy environments. Through home visits and referrals, the program assesses living situations, identifies needs, and connects individuals with appropriate resources. Assistance may include information, referrals to community partners or other agencies, and occasional emergency services. 3630 Aviation Way Medford, OR 97504 Eligibility: Age 60 and older and adults with disabilities Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm, Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (541) 779-6691 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 779-6691 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Jackson County Services: Specialized Information and Referral * Disabilities Issues Specialized Information and Referral * Older Adult/Aging Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - COMMUNITY ACTION AGENCY DISASTER SERVICES - CENTER FOR COMMUNITY RESILIENCE FOOD - FOOD PANTRIES FOOD - SENIOR FOOD PANTRIES HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - DURABLE MEDICAL EQUIPMENT PROGRAM HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OVER THE TOP WIG PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - AFFORDABLE HOUSING HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMEOWNERSHIP CENTER HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING RETENTION PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - JACKSON COUNTY CONTINUUM OF CARE SCREENINGS HOUSING/SHELTER - RENT DEPOSIT ASSISTANCE HOUSING/SHELTER - WEATHERIZATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SUPPORTIVE SERVICES FOR VETERAN FAMILIES UTILITIES - ENERGY ASSISTANCE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ACCESS
